description: Use this API to tabulate specified portions of one or more of the PSSE dynamics data storage arrays. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = dlst(ntype, atype, first, last)

parameters.name: ntype
parameters.description: Number of array portion specifications to be supplied; must be between 1 and 6, inclusive. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: atype
parameters.description: An array of NTYPE elements specifying a list of PSSE array type codes. No more than one occurrence of each of the valid ATYPE values is allowed in each use of this API. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: first
parameters.description: An array of NTYPE elements specifying a list of starting indices in the data array(s) specified by the corresponding ATYPE entry. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: last
parameters.description: An array of NTYPE elements specifying a list of ending indices in the data array(s) specified by the corresponding ATYPE entry. (input; next available - 1 by default for ATYPE = 1 through 5; 6 by default for ATYPE = 6).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
